design_philosophy.emotional_tone: Friendly, Authentic, Energetic, Rustic but Professional
core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Folk tradition with modern minimalist web design.
Emotion First: Every interaction should feel welcoming and lively.
Content is King: High-quality imagery of instruments and band members takes center stage.
Negative Space: Generous padding to let the content breathe.

typography.installation_guide: Add these fonts via Google Fonts in index.html: <link href='https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:wght@400;600;700&family=Manrope:wght@400;500;700&family=Caveat:wght@400;700&display=swap' rel='stylesheet'>

buttons.primary: rounded-full bg-orange-700 text-white hover:bg-orange-800 transition-all duration-300 px-8 py-3 font-medium text-lg shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl hover:-translate-y-1
buttons.secondary: rounded-full border-2 border-stone-900 text-stone-900 hover:bg-stone-900 hover:text-white transition-all duration-300 px-8 py-3 font-medium text-lg

cards.wrapper: bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-300 overflow-hidden border border-stone-100

navigation.wrapper: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 transition-all duration-300 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-white/10
navigation.link: text-sm md:text-base font-medium tracking-wide hover:text-orange-600 transition-colors uppercase

inputs.default: rounded-lg border-stone-200 bg-stone-50 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-orange-200 focus:border-orange-500 transition-all

grids.bento_gallery: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-4 md:gap-6 auto-rows-[300px]

visual_enhancers.textures: Use subtle grain overlay on backgrounds to add 'paper' feel.
visual_enhancers.border_radius: rounded-2xl for cards, rounded-full for buttons/badges
visual_enhancers.shadows: shadow-sm for cards, shadow-xl for floating elements

instructions_to_main_agent: Use 'Playfair Display' for all Headings (H1-H3). Use 'Manrope' for body text.
Implement a smooth scroll behavior using 'lenis' or CSS 'scroll-behavior: smooth'.
Create a 'Music' section using the 'Bento' grid layout.
Use the provided image URLs for specific sections. Do NOT use placeholders unless specified.
Ensure the 'Contact' section uses Social Icons (Lucide or React Icons) and NO form.
Implement a 'Language Switcher' (SLO | ITA | ENG) in the navbar.
The site must be 'Mobile-First'. Check responsive behaviors.
Use Shadcn components for complex interactions but style them to match the 'Organic & Earthy' theme (remove default borders, add soft shadows).
Add a 'grain' texture overlay using a fixed pointer-events-none div with a noise background image if possible, or keep it clean if not.
universal_guidelines: Do not use generic centered layouts. Use asymmetry.
Use 2-3x more spacing than typical designs (p-24 instead of p-8).
Every interaction needs micro-animations (hover, focus, active).
Ensure all interactive elements have 'data-testid' attributes.
